Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.mediator

Class DocumentManager

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.mediator.DocumentManager
public class DocumentManager extends Object
This class manages the creation of VStar "documents", i.e. models and GUI components and important state. It will also expand to manage document printing, saving (and the need to) etc. Another thing this class will allow us to do is to cache GUI components (and by association, their models) permitting reuse of these and updates to models. TODO: call it ComponentManager instead?

    • createPhaseChangeListener

      public Listener<PhaseChangeMessage> createPhaseChangeListener()
      Return a phase change listener that updates epoch and period information in preparation for creating or retrieving phase plot components.
      TODO: when we have finally unified observations as a single list across all models, a listener for this message can call setPhases() on that list.

    • findActiveWindow

      public static Window findActiveWindow()
      Find and return the active window or null if one does not exist, e.g. the case where the UI is that of an applet.
